name: rewrite
description: Reinsurance underwriting toolkit bundling four skills: regulr (ingest a reinsurance submission and produce the cedent's ground-up loss ratio pricing analysis), reconintel (benchmark a new reinsurance treaty against an in-force portfolio, clause by clause), replace (produce a committee authorization-approval package: an email-safe HTML approval request plus a branded authorization-terms PDF), and resus (run sourced counterparty due diligence on the cedent, MGA, and TPA — open-web risk research plus S&P Capital IQ statutory financials and Schedule P reserves — and produce a cited PDF report).
